title: Epic Fight + Backpacked Compat
description: Epic Fight and Backpacked compatibility patch. Fixes rendering of Backpacked backpacks with Epic Fight animations.
body:
This is a small client-side compatibility patch for [Yessman's Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight) + [MrCrayFish's Backpacked](https://www.mrcrayfish.com/mods/backpacked).
Epic Fight changes how the player model is animated and Backpacked expects normal vanilla body, so backpacks don't render at all when combat mode is active. This patch makes the backpack render correctly on the Epic Fight armature during all the animations.

**Epic Fight and Backpacked are REQUIRED mods, Backpacked is available on MrCrayFish's website or on Curseforge.**

![before patch showing the backpack disappearing when you enable Epic Fight's combat mode.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84a79bab22986cde679b8033fa32c2db4f6502e9.gif)
![After patch showing the backpack properly rendered during a roll and when you Epic Fight's combat mode is enabled.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e6908f6a9976dd66c7e8ce111d60d9055acb67d.gif)
